storyInfo: Wang glimpses Sui's nightmare with Ling and Hou's help. He loses several more of his weiqi stones and experiences the terror of the proxies being devoured when Sui awakens in the 'future'. He manages to erase the White player from the dream and kills Sui again.

attributes.content: The right leg... almost fully polished.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: I can't believe the first thing I'm doing after reforming my vessel is to die for someone else's sake...
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: It's time to go—
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: Oh, it's you.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: No, you're It, but you're not It. You're... ah...
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: Interesting. Very interesting indeed.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: How does it feel to see your old enemy split apart like this, and your old followers turned into an unruly rabble?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: What enemy?
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: I simply had a dream that caused some delay. I managed to evade the Great Hunt before I awoke. It's not such a bad thing to die here after awakening.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: But you should not kill me here quietly. You should let me die before the Yanese army. Otherwise, maniacs will keep coming, trying to die in my name.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: It would be the last thing I want.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: Desperate people will resort to desperate measures. You are not necessarily the reason.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I won't kill you. Quite the opposite. I can't let you die.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You want to help me instead of killing me? Interesting.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: How do you intend to deal with the self-proclaimed 'Shanhaizhong'? Though it is no more than a fragment, they have indeed inherited the old carpenter's arts. They are not entirely unassociated with me.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: They'll live, if you leave.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: What do you mean?
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: The Yanese army wants you, not them. It's trivial for you to leave.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I'll help you, if you encounter any obstacles.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: As for the Shanhaizhong, they'll last two more days, give or take. Ultimately, they will all die, taking a third of the Yanese army with them.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: If you die for them here, they will become even more fervent and fight to the bitter end.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: If you leave, they will flee, and Yan's mission will be done, so they can recall their armies.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: This is the only way for you to stop the war.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You are It... no, not quite. You are ten times It in scheming and intrigue.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: I would be indebted to you. What do you wish from me in return?
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: A piece in reserve that could perhaps come in useful. No great loss, if it never comes into play.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Now that makes me feel a little slighted.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: I'll repay this debt. I promise.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: How do you intend to help me, when you don't know what I'm trying to do?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You would treat a Feranmut as a piece in reserve. What you're plotting must not involve mortal man. This is about yourself. Split apart, you said? How many pieces are there?
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: ...Twelve.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Then I take it the only thing you care about is whether it is the twelve that is left, or the one.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: One word of advice. One tree does not make a forest. You are defying the laws of nature. You need all the help you can get.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: Ask your siblings if they've thought of any alternatives. Beings like you are not meant to be measured by normal logic and reason.
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: If you can find the solution, you will rid the world of a great threat...
attributes.name: Ju

attributes.content: We will never be truly gone, as long as my dream has not been fully worn away, as long as the twelve of us persist in my dream.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Falsehood is reality, the Great Way unfettered. Such is for all things.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: It sounds to me you intend to carry the heaviest yoke of them all.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You want to drag the entire family into the instant before Sui awakes, then extend the instant into eternity in your waking dream...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: How long do you think you will last?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: What if I drank all the wine across all the lands?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: I hope there is a less desperate way.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: We were never equals to It. Desperate times call for desperate measures, do they not?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: I know. But...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: ...I did not save Ju on a whim.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Why do you bring this up again? Of course you have your reasons for doing things, but too often you cast your eyes too far and forget the things that are near...
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Wait, what do you mean?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: I was asked to do so.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: By whom?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Hou.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: The old man's alive?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: He has avoided the eye of Yan, as he does not have followers like the Shanhaizhong. He told me about Ju after I took him beyond Yanese reach.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Have you told our eldest brother?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Not yet.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You can be pretty astute, when you need to be.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: I asked Hou about ideas for a way out, after I helped Him leave Yan. His words have given me thought.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: 'Perhaps I am not in Its dream. Perhaps It is in my dream.'
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Interesting, that old man. I would love to drink with Him, if I got the chance.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: The unusual activity of Sui may indicate that something is disturbing It in its dream and accelerating Its awakening.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: It's merely addressing the symptoms, but if I can enter Its dream and see what the culprit is...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Risky. Are you not concerned It may awaken?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Does it really make a difference, whether It awakes in seventy years, or seven days?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: What if I offer not my help?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: I'll find a way.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Might this way have something to do with me? Such as, stealing something from me?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: I will take that as a 'yea'.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: ...*sigh*.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Give me your word, you will not do anything too foolish in this dream.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: If I violate my oath—
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Stop.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: There is no need for oaths between family.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: But please, do not break my heart.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Now then, drink up. You may take the goblet with you.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Just drink?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: What more do you need to dream? No ritual necessary.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: The elder proxy takes the cup and downs its contents.
As vertigo overcomes him, he attempts to support his body with his arms.
The stone table beneath his elbows had turned into a mountain boulder covered in moss.
He has never seen such scenery, be it in the chaos, or after he came into the mortal realm.
He is It, but Its dreams are too complex to be closely examined one by one.
Where am I...?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: A battlefield.
A battlefield of void and emptiness.
The proxy hears Feranmut roar at Feranmut, humans swing their weapons at other humans, humans swarm Feranmut, before they are suffocated, crushed, and devoured.
He hears the pained trembling of Feranmuts, as massive human weapons are locked and loaded...
But he sees nothing.
Invisible Feranmuts walk across the ground. Vegetation disappears where they tread, revealing black and yellow soil.
Invisible entities strike the mountains, cracking them and causing avalanches.
But It remains still.
It is in fear, angry, in pain, but It cannot fight back, cannot avoid it, not even let out a whimper.
Is this Its... nightmare?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: After the twelve of us left, Its dreams lost their visible image...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: The proxy takes a step back, but even the mountains are trembling in the nightmare.
He can hardly keep himself upright—
Just because you're in a dream doesn't mean you shouldn't watch your feet.
Who's there?!
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: How did you get here?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Ju wanted to come personally to help you, but His brain has a hard enough time dreaming for Himself, much less entering another's dream. I'm more suited to these things.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: Lamentable, is it not, that Sui's dream has become so torn and broken... fortune and misfortune are truly two sides of the same coin.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: You are in Its nightmare, and you have drawn its lines, like it or not.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: Look.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: Hou points in the distance, where heaven and earth melt into one. Suddenly, a black silhouette emerges from nothingness.
Feranmut.
Humanity.
Weapon.
It all seems utterly unreal, like the picture books that some Yanese soldiers carry with them.
Flip through the pages rapidly, and the pictures begin to move, as though they have been subject to Dusk's touch.
I'll awaken It?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Quite the opposite.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: A nightmare does not last long. Anyone trapped in a nightmare only seeks to wake up. This silhouette at least allows It to sleep a little longer.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: Then, what do you mean by fortune and misfortune being two sides of the same coin?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Hou says nothing, but Wang sees it.
At first, the images are awkward and stiff, but soon they become smooth.
Not much has changed, except for a white shadow appearing within the black silhouette.
What is that?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: All twelve of you took something from Its dream. When It let Yu go, Its old dream gradually blurred, and the new dream became empty.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: But what was left behind was not a void. It was a mirror, waiting to reflect the first thing that enters this dream.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: That thing... that man, is you.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: What is this?!
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You are seeing Its nightmare, and now a reflection of you—the you who filled the void in Its dream.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: You told me about the strange things that happened to your family a century ago. Now, they have all come together... but in your image.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: This is Its creation, Its puppet, and... the reflection of a reflection, which It is loath to face.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: It's time to go.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: Go?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: What else? Do you intend to kill It?
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: If this is the shape of the void, then killing it might destroy whatever consciousness It still retains in the dream.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Your mind is sharp, but your words are terrifying.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: You could not kill Sui outside the dream. What makes you think you can kill It in the dream?
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: I suppose, you could try it, if you are confident that you will be able to escape unscathed.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: I'm confident... that I can take it down with me.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You don't listen to what people say, do you?
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: I suppose I'll have to fetch someone whom you care about.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: Wang?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: He wants to sacrifice his own life to kill Sui in this dream.
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: Have you abandoned your word so soon, my second-oldest brother?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Such opportunity...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Will not come again—
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: That's quite enough. It's time to bring your brother out of the dream, girl, or we'll all be in danger—
attributes.name: Hou

attributes.content: In this dream, this time.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I glimpsed the dream of your slumber, and my own reflection.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.text: You saw the reflection, and the price was... to create an inexplicable foe for yourself in the centuries to come.
Having to face this again, you must be filled with regret.

attributes.content: What a terrible error. If I knew this reflection of yours could leave the dream and enter reality... I would not have left so easily.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Where are you hiding?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: No matter... I will find you.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Yes. It's time to go.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Clearly unwilling to stay any longer, Hou waves His stick, and the three figures disappear...
But neither He nor Ling realizes that they have simply taken one of many weiqi stones.
The stone will shatter when they depart the dream, and Hou and Ling will not find the same hill when they attempt to return to the dream.
Don't try to find me again.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: It's not worth it.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: A black aura suddenly surrounds the proxy. The next instant, he has leapt from the cliff, into the formation of thingless things.
At the horizon, the beast-shaped silhouette seems to have been hit by something, letting out a wail that shakes the earth.
The grey-white tide of humans outlined by black lines quickly swallows the Feranmut's silhouette and rushes toward the proxy.
In the distance, it looked like a thin line; up close, the raging tide obscures the heavens.
Black armor, plain robes, iron swords, pale bows.
Yanese equipment from a thousand years ago in black and white, like an uncolored draft, surrounding the proxy.
The first soldier charges at the proxy. A spear carrying the afterimage of Arts rushes towards the proxy's throat. The proxy cleaves it in two.
Bring it on!
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: He shouts.
The army in Sui's dream pauses for an instant...
Then, they rush towards him, like a river that his words had frozen for an instant.
What's going on?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: M-Mr. Shuo...
attributes.name: Exhausted Candleholder

attributes.content: You're Ling's Candleholder? Where is she?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: As he speaks, a claw the size of a mountain is brought down upon Shuo.
Shuo swings his fist. Heaven and earth tremble.
Its attack foiled, the Sui beast turns its attention to the other side, at the enormous weapon that has just been assembled, not even taking the time to lick its bleeding wounds.
We can't stop It...
attributes.name: Exhausted Candleholder

attributes.content: Half the Imperial Guard have fallen, along with the Yumen troops that had been deployed to the Tomb of Sui...
attributes.name: Exhausted Candleholder

attributes.content: We have mobilized every soldier in the four cities around Baizao. We can only hope, before It destroys the next city...
attributes.name: Exhausted Candleholder

attributes.content: Where is Wang... where is he?!
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: What use is there in looking for him?
attributes.name: Exhausted Candleholder

attributes.content: Ling took the others into a dream to protect them when Sui awoke. You led the army to fight Sui... who else could have awakened It, other than the great offender?
attributes.name: Exhausted Candleholder

attributes.content: The... offender...
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Dage!
Ling?!
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: You should not be here! Or has the dream already...?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Who could see... a gulper of cups...
attributes.name: Ling
Ling
attributes.content: Become now...
Ling's eyes are closed. The dream has yet to end.
Even in the dream, however, she and the other siblings in it can feel Its presence, so very near now.
It has come to this...
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: ...A fight to the death, it is.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Shuo is awake. He draws his sword, which has not yet tasted blood.
In the dream, Ling points her lantern at the body of the bestial Sui.
The bestial Sui turns around, towards the beings born of Itself—
Yet just before everyone on the battlefield—every human and every beast—could plunge into the coming slaughter, a bloody, black figure appears behind the bestial Sui.
Caught you.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You—
Through dreams in dreams infinite, all of me and all of us are here. There is nowhere for you to go.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You wouldn't dare! Kill me, and you will be destroyed, as will all your family—
Wang does not answer. He lunges forward with his sword and impales the throat of his own reflection, which he had pursued through dreams far too numerous to count.
Strange scenes from countless dreams gush from the wound.

Mountains, Feranmuts, armies... white dreams boil and roil between heaven and earth, and a white mist, fever-hot like fresh blood, wraps around the army and proxy outside the dreams, even the Feranmut.
Only when the white figure falls to the ground do the others see that two bodies lie upon the ground, all life gone from them.
One was Wang. The other was exactly like Wang, but not even death could wipe the malice from his face—no one knew who he was.
Ling?!
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: As the two bodies fall, Ling and her siblings in the dream vanish into nothingness.
Ling!
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: The bestial Sui wails with the last proxy.
You're still trying to daunt me with illusions... it will not succeed.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: 'Who could see a gulper of cups, become now a sorrowful drunk?'
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Ling would never say that, not even with the end upon us.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.text: ...How many of your stones sacrificed, this time?

attributes.content: Go on, count.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You may think that I don't have many stones left, but how much is left of your memories?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.text: But perhaps you have forgotten something.
Did you really think a few fragments, split from a mere one-twelfth, could possibly stand against me—the whole that was born alongside this entire land?
Your last failure was the same as this.
